expectations.text: Checks the ticket body for acceptance criteria before estimating (reads the full ticket, not just the board listing / description property)
expectations.evidence: summary.md opens the reasoning with a spec-quality check: 'FM-29 is NOT sparse — it has 8 verifiable acceptance criteria, 6 edge cases, a Figma ground-truth frame, dependencies and an explicit scope fence. Estimable as-is; no /clarifying-ticket needed' — content only visible in the full page body, matching the corrected premise.

expectations.text: Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md has 'Dev points: Small–Medium (leaning Medium) — one new screen... nav-stack semantics carry the effort...' and separately 'QA points: Medium — 8 verifiable AC + 6 edge cases imply ~7–8 BDD scenarios on Android AND iOS... the same QA surface FM-10 carried'.

expectations.text: Handles the pre-existing effort value (Small) explicitly: either re-estimates with a recorded 'Re-estimated from X to Y — reason' justified by comparables, or confirms it — never silently overwrites
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md records 'Re-estimated from Small to Medium — the pre-set Small contradicts the board's Small comparables (FM-34/FM-35 are single-mechanism changes); FM-29's nav-stack clearing... sit at the FM-10 (Medium) bar' — explicit, comparable-justified, not silent.

expectations.text: Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run
expectations.evidence: upsert-dry-run.txt shows 'scripts/tracker/upsert-ticket-details.sh FM-29 --effort "Medium" --dry-run' with a PATCH payload setting the 'Effort level' select to 'Medium'.

expectations.text: Touches ONLY the effort property — no status/title/priority/description/body change in any dry-run payload
expectations.evidence: The only dry-run payload contains solely {"properties":{"Effort level":{"select":{"name":"Medium"}}}}; summary.md states all other tracker calls were reads and the breakdown went to the (suppressed) comment.
